calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Justin Brown And Catalina Structured Funding, Inc. Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CATALINA STRUCTURED FUNDING, INC.'s Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Justin Brown And Catalina Structured Funding, Inc. Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.

Petitioner Catalina Structured Funding, Inc.'s petition for approval for transfer of structured settlement payment rights by and between Justin Brown and Catalina Structured Funding, Inc. pursuant to California Insurance Code 10134 et seq. is granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown. Counsel for Petitioner is reminded in the future to submit courtesy copies of all filed and lodged papers with Department 302 as required by the Local Rules.

order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
